conversations.content: I have many items in my cart and want to clear out everything except for the electric toothbrush. Please remove the other items and place the order.

<function_thought>
To execute the user's request of clearing out everything except for the electric toothbrush from their cart and then placing the order, I will first need to view the current cart to identify the product ID of the electric toothbrush. Afterwards, I will remove all other items from the cart and finally, checkout with the electric toothbrush. I will begin by executing the 'view_cart' function to see the items in the cart.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_cart()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The current cart contains three items: 
1. Wireless Mouse (ID: P001)
2. Backpack (ID: P017)
3. Electric Toothbrush (ID: P011)

To fulfill the user's request, I will now remove the Wireless Mouse and the Backpack from the cart. After that, I will proceed to checkout with the Electric Toothbrush. I will start by removing the two items from the cart one by one.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[cart_remove_product(product_id="P001"), cart_remove_product(product_id="P017")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Product ID P001 removed from cart.
Product ID P017 removed from cart.

<function_thought>
Both the Wireless Mouse and the Backpack have been successfully removed from the cart. The only remaining item is the Electric Toothbrush. Now, I will proceed to checkout with the Electric Toothbrush by using its product ID (P011).
</function_thought>

<function_call>[checkout_selected_cart(product_ids=["P011"])]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The checkout process for the Electric Toothbrush has been successfully completed. The user's request to clear out all items except for the electric toothbrush and place the order has been fulfilled. There are no further actions required at this time.
</function_thought>

<final_answer>
Your order for the Electric Toothbrush has been successfully placed! If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask.
</final_answer>
